column1: 註釋 : # 在個別性別／年齡／教育程度組別內佔在統計時整體就業人口的百分比。以一九九五年九月至十月的所有男性就業人士為例，4.8%的現職需要其在內地工作。
column3: Notes : # As a percentage of the total employed population in the respective sex/age/educational attainment groups at the time of enumeration.  For example, among all male employed persons in September-October 1995, 4.8% were required to work in the Mainland in their present job.

column1: @ 具中學教育程度的人士包括具中一至中五教育程度的人士，而具預科教育程度的人士則包括具中六及中七教育程度的人士。
column3: @ Persons with secondary educational attainment include those with Secondary 1 to Secondary 5 educational attainment while persons with matriculation educational attainment include those with Secondary 6 to Secondary 7 educational attainment.
